strategy: Do not cast any of your own spells on her. Anything you cast, even AoE, turns you into a Statue for 99 rounds (the deck is all Pass cards plus one Break Free).
She hands every non-polymorphed wizard a Blindfolded Hit card at the end of every other round. Attack only with these.
She must be defeated with a Blindfolded Hit; killing her with any other spell full-heals her via Moon Blessing.
Pass and bank Blindfolded Hits, then finish her with them; she is only 2700 health.
cheatNotes: Casting any spell on her, even AoE, polymorphs you into a Statue for 99 rounds, so never cast your own spells at her.
The Statue deck is 77 cards, all Pass except one Break Free, so you are stuck until you draw it.
Killing her with anything other than a Blindfolded Hit fully heals her, so only finish with the Blindfolded Hits she gives you.
She hands out a Blindfolded Hit to each un-polymorphed wizard every other round; these are your only weapons.
